title: centella dolichocarpa
intro: Centella dolichocarpa, also known as Indian pennywort, is a perennial aquatic plant native to tropical Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and wound-healing properties. The health benefits of Centella dolichocarpa include improving cognitive function, reducing inflammation and oxidative stress, and promoting wound healing. Centella dolichocarpa can be prepared into herbal teas, capsules, or topical creams, making it a versatile addition to natural health regimens.
